scenarios.idealSpecificInput: Plan a webhook notification system for the billing module. Users need real-time payment status updates. Done when: events fire on charge/refund/dispute, retries on failure, dashboard shows delivery status.
Break the config refactor into milestones. Scope: src/cli/config/ only. Riskiest part: the merge logic. Kill criteria: if validation breaks existing configs.
Create milestone files for the dashboard load time improvement. Target: under 1s first paint. Focus on preset list rendering and scan data fetch.
